name: Ollama
description: Ollama provider for running local LLMs on your own machine.

OLLAMA_API_ENDPOINT.label: Api Endpoint
OLLAMA_API_ENDPOINT.help: Base URL for the Ollama API. The plugin will strip this to the domain part and append the necessary API paths.

OLLAMA_SMALL_MODEL.label: Small Model
OLLAMA_SMALL_MODEL.help: Name or tag of the small-sized Ollama model to use for text and object generation.

OLLAMA_MEDIUM_MODEL.label: Medium Model
OLLAMA_MEDIUM_MODEL.help: Name or tag of the medium-sized Ollama model (defined in config but not currently used).

OLLAMA_LARGE_MODEL.label: Large Model
OLLAMA_LARGE_MODEL.help: Name or tag of the large-sized Ollama model to use for text and object generation.

OLLAMA_EMBEDDING_MODEL.label: Embedding Model
OLLAMA_EMBEDDING_MODEL.help: Name or tag of the Ollama model used to generate text embeddings.

SMALL_MODEL.label: Model
SMALL_MODEL.help: Fallback environment variable for specifying a small model if OLLAMA_SMALL_MODEL is not set.

LARGE_MODEL.label: Model
LARGE_MODEL.help: Fallback environment variable for specifying a large model if OLLAMA_LARGE_MODEL is not set.
